summarization.a: A heat map displaying the pressure of TMA at various positions in the reactor.
summarization.b: A heat map displaying the pressure of DMAF (Dimethylamine formaldehyde)  at various positions in the reactor.

b.question: Does DMAF fully penetrate a trench to the bottom?
b.answer: b	No it does not, the pressure is too low to reach the bottom of the trench.

b.question: What can be done to increase the depth at which there is still DMAF?
b.answer: b	Increase bubbler flow to have higher partial pressure of DMAF.

a.question: Above which trench is the slit located?
Is it likely that depositions with this tool will result in conformal layers?
a.answer: a	It is likely, the pressure is constant over the full depth of the trenches indicating that conformal growth can be achieved.
